LoginPage.description: Jump back into the dashboard for demo play sessions, hourly credits, subscription plans and Stripe test-mode billing flows.
LoginPage.disclaimer: Sandbox credentials only. No real cards are charged in this project.
LoginPage.title: Continue your cloud gaming session.
features: Manage one-time play-hour packs and subscription access.
Keep auth, API cookies and billing actions in one SaaS surface.
Use Stripe Checkout, invoices and customer portal in test mode.

LoginForm.footer: Protected by cookie-based auth and backed by Stripe test mode billing.
